TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tamalakaw, title = Tamalakaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamalakaw} }

S.FORM: alang Tamalakaw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 1,352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 663 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 36%, Amis 7%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamalakaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tamalakaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tamalakaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Tamalakaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamalakaw hya' ga A'lripay. tay mkyahu' na Tamalakaw hya' ga Likavung. tay 'llaw na Tamalakaw hya' ga Pinaski. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tamalakaw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Beinan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 1,352 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 689 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 663 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 36%, Amis 7%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tamalakaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tamalakaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tamalakaw hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Tamalakaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tamalakaw hya' ga A'lripay. tay mkyahu' na Tamalakaw hya' ga Likavung. tay 'llaw na Tamalakaw hya' ga Pinaski. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamalakaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu βeinan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa aʔlripaj. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa lika*uŋ. taj ʔllaw na tamalakaw ħjaʔ ɣa pinas~ɕki. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
